text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: No worries...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On my way back from my first shrine<n>visit of the
year, I happen to hear<n>indistinct mumbling coming
from the<n>side of the street.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: No worries at aaall...
choice_data_list: Sasami? What are you doing in an igloo?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Whoa, <username>?! Is that really<n>you?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Sniff! You've got to help me! I'mabout to die from the cold!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Gulp, gulp... Ahhh! That broughtme right back from the brink! ☆ It reallyisn't New Year's without some foodand a swig of hot amazake to wash itdown with! ♪
choice_data_list: So how did you end up out there?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, you see, I gave my master a<n>little friendly
poke in the derriere with a<n>needle as a way to
liven up the new<n>year...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
But I failed miserably and got kicked<n>out! Teehee!
☆
choice_data_list: Ah, I see. Just like always, then.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Give me a break! Stop talking like Ialways fail! Hic!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I may not look it, but even I nail the<n>treatment
sometimes!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Let me prove it to you right now! ☆<n>Just think of it
as my New Year's gift<n>to you! ♪ M'kay?
choice_data_list:
I'm not receiving treatment from someone
who's obviously drunk!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I scramble to put myself a safe<n>distance from
her, but she quickly<n>blocks my only escape path!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come onnn! ♪ Name a chakra you<n>want
activated, and I'll get down to<n>business! Lesh go!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I guess I have no choice but to grin<n>and bear with
it!
choice_data_list: I-I'll go with the health chakra...
Maybe something like the charm chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Aaall righty! ☆ Ready, steady, hic!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Overwhelming power surges through<n>every
single pore of my body, and I<n>feel much more
clearheaded. The<n>treatment is a resounding
success!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hic... Well, am I da best orwhaaat?
choice_data_list: You truly are incredible, Sasa... Oh.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Snrk! Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I carry her snoozing form to the<n>sofa, I
entertain the thought that<n>maybe, just maybe,
she's a better<n>acupuncturist when inebriated.
